ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., 0050, AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price match in milliseconds */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock during the minute */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock during the minute */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the minute */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the minute */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded during the minute */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume during the minute */,
  "price_change" REAL /* Price change during the minute */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change during the minute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code of the stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the stock exchange is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector" (
  "stock_sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-sector relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sector ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_sector_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_industry" (
  "stock_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-industry relationship */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_industry_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industry ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-permission relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock entry */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock added to the watchlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is set for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price-up, price-down) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert is triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, disabled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert trigger */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert condition was met */,
  "trigger_value" REAL /* Value at which the alert was triggered */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_triggers_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, custom) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or content of the report (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, trade) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., economic, news) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the external data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value or content of the external data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, cancelled, adjusted) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., user request, system error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news feed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)
